0.text: Two nodules in the superior segment of the right lower lobe, largest measuring 3.5 mm

1.text: Bronchiectatic changes in the pericardiac area in the upper lobe inferior lingular segment of the left lung

2.text: Bronchiectatic changes in the lower lobe anterior medial segment of the left lung

3.text: Tree-in-bud-like nodular opacities in the posterior segment of the lower lobe of the left lung
